prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学（推荐/偏热）、自动化类（推荐）、数学类（推荐）等理工科专业社会热度较高；青海省2026年物理类考生 估算约30,672人，与2025年30,457人基本持平，考生规模稳定；郑州大学位于河南省郑州市，与青海省地理距离较远，属 于跨省报考；青海省考生规模小，招生计划稳定在19人，属于该校在西北地区的常规招生省份，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次稳定走势、2026年招生计划 持平、学校排名上升但声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准3641名基础上预计位次小幅后移，竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约3656名，区间3363-3949名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 6865 (abnormally high), in 2022 about 3453, in 2023 about 3641, in 2024 about 3498, and in 2025 (Physics Category) about 3641. Excluding the 2021 anomaly, the rankings over the past four years have stabilized in the 3450-3650 range, with a fluctuation of about 200 places and no obvious trend, indicating a relatively stable competitive landscape for Physics Category candidates in Qinghai; the 2021 science enrollment plan was 23, from 2022 to 2025 it was 19, and the 2026 Physics Category plan remains 19, stable for five consecutive years with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus public opinion management incidents, with no major negative impact; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 8th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, indicating high application attention; in 2025, the admission line showed a collapse signal nationwide (Heilongjiang Physics Group admitted at 389 points), and historical abnormal events have a lagging effect on candidates' application psychology; in the fourth round of evaluation, Chemistry, Materials Science and Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering are B+ disciplines, which are related to the Physics Category enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Automation, Mathematics, Water Conservancy, Mechanical Engineering).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine (recommended/slightly hot), Automation (recommended), Mathematics (recommended) and other science and engineering majors have high social popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 30,672, basically the same as 30,457 in 2025, with a stable candidate scale; Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, far from Qinghai Province geographically, making it a cross-province application; Qinghai Province has a small candidate pool, with a stable enrollment plan of 19, making it a regular enrollment province in the northwest region for this university, with no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical ranking trend, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the rising university ranking but slightly negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 3641, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward, with slightly intensified competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3656, with a range of 3363-3949.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3363-3949, it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors such as Mathematics and Electrical Engineering and Automation as the main choices, Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine and Automation as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors like Water Conservancy, Mechanical Engineering, Preventive Medicine, and Energy and Power Engineering as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3363), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 683; in 2022, about 845; in 2023, due to an abnormal gap, it plummeted to about 3386; in 2024, it recovered to about 908; in 2025 (History Category), about 1212. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the ranking over the past 4 years has gradually shifted from 683 to 1212, a cumulative backward shift of about 529 places, reflecting a continuous increase in the competitive threshold for this university among History Category candidates in Qinghai. In 2021, the liberal arts enrollment plan was 12; from 2022 to 2025, it was 16; in 2026, the History Category plan remains 16, stable for 5 consecutive years with no expansion or contraction, making the enrollment plan neutral in impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus public opinion management incidents (such as clarification of cat abuse rumors), with no major negative impacts. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 8th (high heat), indicating high exposure on short video platforms and high application attention. In 2022, there was a significant negative reputation (Anhui admission line dropped to the first-tier line, Guangxi dropped nearly 40,000 places), and in 2025, the admission line showed signs of collapse nationwide (Heilongjiang admitted at 389 points). These historical abnormal events have a lagging impact on candidates' application psychology. In the fourth round of discipline evaluation, Marxist Theory, Chemistry, Materials Science and Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering were rated B+, indicating overall disciplinary strength at an upper-middle level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (relatively popular) and Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) are popular liberal arts majors with high social attention. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Qinghai Province is about 48,000, with History Category estimated at about 17,328, roughly the same as 2025's 17,212, indicating stable candidate numbers. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, geographically far from Qinghai Province, making it a cross-province application. Qinghai Province has a small candidate pool, and the enrollment plan is stable at 16, making it a regular enrollment province for this university in the northwest region, with no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of backward ranking shifts over the years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the rising university ranking but somewhat negative reputation, and other factors, based on the 2025 baseline of 1212, the ranking is expected to continue to shift slightly backward, with competition intensifying slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1232, with a range of 1108-1356.
